subject: Create helm charts for oof-cmso
commit_message:
Create helm charts for oof-cmso

This change provides the necessary helm charts to
instantiate the oof-cmso database (mariadb-galera) and
oof-cmso service to support the scheduling of change management
requests.

Issue-ID: OPTFRA-373
Change-Id: I5e5024849f251eee29d3d8697e46756211b5c640
Signed-off-by: Jerry Flood <jflood@att.com>

Patch Set 15: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

I would recommend merging the service chart with the main oof-cmso chart. Also, merge the db-secrets chart with the main oof-cmso.

Do you need your own mariadb deployment? Does the one in common not work for you?

Patch Set 16: Code-Review-1

I echo Kiran's question about MariaDB.  I don't see any reason not to use the standardized common Maria DB chart, as is done by other components like SDNC.
